author: ec2-user
text: OSCORE/EDHOC slice integrated in order as c8f6306e, 30e77fcd, 58389286, ff32ea3a, 2f6dc664, a49917c7. lib.rs conflict union preserved RPL/runtime exports and durable-state fail-closed private Stack plus secure exports. Gates: OSCORE 93 tests/doc-tests, no-default, Clippy -D warnings; node 212 tests/doc-tests and no-default. Reviews filed deferred protocol follow-ups project-LICHEN-38qm, v0ee, y72o, xx31, qaqt, 4iz9. Public composition issue project-LICHEN-6uyi remains open and blocks final validation .3: RplStack constructors require now-private Stack, while re-exporting Stack would reopen plaintext/raw CoAP paths; safe composition requires out-of-ledger architecture.
